title: Forward Deployed Engineer | OpenAI | Colin Jarvis | 33 comments
full_text:
Colin Jarvis’ Post
Colin Jarvis
1y
Report this post
I'm very pleased to announce that I'm going to lead the new Forward Deployed Engineering function here at OpenAI - our focus is getting our customers to production, whether it's through a zero-to-one novel application of our tech or helping you to scale proven cases like customer service and recommmenders to fit your unique systems and customer base.
If you want to be part of making this vision a reality then please apply here - we'll be looking for applicants in San Francisco, New York and EMEA: https://lnkd.in/et22sQmZ
Look forward to building with all of you
589

Hope you find it useful;
Also, PLS ignore the name; am really bad at naming things;
I once had a turtle named panda;
With regards,
Mohit enji Negi
